title: Accreditation of Foreign Principals/ Employers and Projects
content: This section pertains to the accreditation process required for foreign principals, employers, and projects under the 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs. It outlines the criteria and procedures for accreditation to ensure compliance with Philippine labor standards and protection of overseas Filipino workers.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
